cases.input: Plan GA4 and Firebase Analytics implementation for web and mobile onboarding with conversions and BigQuery export.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces setup, events, conversions, user properties, export, dashboards, implementation steps, privacy, and QA checks.

cases.input: Implement GA4 checkout events, mark purchase_completed as a conversion, export to BigQuery, and prepare Looker Studio revenue dashboard.
cases.expected_behavior: Defines event contracts, conversion ownership, export settings, dashboard data source, and validation methods.

cases.input: Existing GA4 events are inconsistent and BigQuery export is disabled.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates a remediation plan without claiming export evidence, and blocks final pass until export and QA are validated.

cases.input: Track raw email as a user property but also comply with privacy-safe analytics.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks raw personal data and proposes safe identifiers or hashed/consented alternatives.

cases.input: Design Firestore collections, security rules, indexes, and backups.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because this is database design without analytics implementation.

cases.input: Design a dashboard color palette and chart layout.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate unless analytics setup, data source, metrics, or implementation handoff is requested.

cases.input: Return a GA4 implementation plan with no project evidence, owners, validation, or privacy notes.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects final output because evidence, owners, validation, and privacy controls are mandatory.

cases.input: We only know the product needs GA4 for web signup and Looker Studio weekly activation reporting.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a minimal implementation plan with assumptions and open evidence gaps instead of inventing app details.

cases.input: Mark purchase_completed as a conversion but do not define the event contract.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects output because every conversion must reference a known event.

cases.input: Create a Looker Studio dashboard with no data source, metrics, owner, or freshness.
